description: A key individual in the media ecosystem, such as a KOL, content creator, influencer, or competitor account

name.description: Real name or username of the individual, e.g. 李佳琦, 罗翔说刑法

role.description: Primary role of the person in the media context

platform.description: Main platform where this person is active

followers_count.description: Number of followers or subscribers, e.g. 5000万, 100万+

niche.description: Content niche or specialty, e.g. 美妆, 科技评测, 知识科普

account_handle.description: Unique account handle or ID on the platform
